programme.title: Jacob Rees-Mogg's State Of The Nation Replay
programme.desc: Join Jacob for his unique and unmissable take on the day's news.

programme.title: Beirut Dreams in Color
programme.desc: Mashrou' Leila were one of the biggest bands in the Middle East, with a lead singer, Hamed, who is the most prominent openly gay rock star in the Arab world. Known globally, their gigs were regular sell-out successes until an event at their 2017 Cairo concert changed everything. Playing to 35,000 people, the band looked out at a sea of swaying flickering lights, including an Egyptian fan flying a rainbow flag. This simple act would later be described by authorities as ‘inciting debauchery', and ultimately catapulted the band, the fan and others into a tragic series of events.

programme.title: I was a terrorist
programme.sub-title: now I run a kindergarten | Is Finland the best place in the world to be a parent?
programme.desc: Hendi Suhartono was part of a plot to detonate four book bombs and blow up a church in Indonesia. He spent seven years in prison after going through a deradicalisation process. After Hendi was released from prison, he received support to open a kindergarten. Hendi meets a friend from his past, Pepi Fernando, and they discuss what led to his radicalisation, the time in prison, his subsequent deradicalisation and how he is devoted to his community. | Finland is a world leader when it comes to early years education. Childcare is affordable and nursery places are universally available in a system that puts children's rights at the centre of decision-making.

programme.title: Quipu: Calls for Justice
programme.desc: Esperanza and Teodula are calling for justice in rural Peru, part of 300,000 people sterilised without consent more than 18 years ago. The Quipu Project is their phoneline that allows victims across the country to share their shocking testimonies and ensure those responsible are punished.

programme.title: The Hour of Lynching
programme.desc: Rakbar, a Muslim dairy farmer, was murdered by a Hindu mob who thought he was taking a cow to be slaughtered for meat. His wife, Asmeena, must undergo an intense iddat (mourning in purdah) and their daughter, Sahila, is forced to abandon school to take care of the household. While the family falls apart, the hate machinery of rightwing Hindu nationalists – politicians and lynch mobs – works overtime to legitimise the killing.

programme.title: Muxes
programme.desc: In Juchitán, Mexico, muxes – children identified as male at birth, but who choose at a young age to be raised as female – are embraced as part of the community.

programme.title: The internet warriors
programme.desc: Who are the people that get so angry online? Meet the internet warriors, in their own homes.

programme.title: The Fight
programme.desc: People with disabilities are among the most discriminated against in Bolivia. Fed up with being ignored, a group of them march across the Andes to the seat of the government in La Paz, asking to speak to President Evo Morales. They are met with riot police, barricades, teargas and water cannon.

programme.title: How Survivors Ink is erasing the marks of the US sex trafficking industry | The Iraqi girls who escaped from Isis
programme.desc: Pimp-led prostitution is one of the most violent and prolific forms of trafficking found in the US, with hundreds of thousands of women sold annually for commercial gain. Many are branded with tattoos by their traffickers as a sign of ownership and control. After experiencing such an ordeal in Columbus, Ohio, Jennifer Kempton founded Survivors Ink, a grassroots project that helps formerly trafficked women to cover up their branding with their own symbols of hope and recovery. | When Isis militants invaded Sinjar in Iraq they took many young Yazidi women and girls – some as young as nine years old – as sexual slaves and forced them to convert to Islam.

programme.title: Italian mafia's cocaine trafficking leaves trail of drug devastation among poor of Brazil
programme.desc: The all-powerful Calabrian crime syndicate 'Ndrangheta has forged a deadly network of drug trafficking routes through Brazil – 80% of all cocaine arriving in Europe comes through the country's Santos port. To mark International Day against Drug Abuse and Illicit Trafficking, we hear from the anti-'Ndrangheta experts risking their lives to speak out against the syndicate, and take to the streets of Brazil's Crackolândia districts, where crack addiction is destroying lives.

programme.title: Teranga: the migrant-run Afrobeat nightclub uniting Naples
programme.desc: Fata and Yankuba are two young Gambians with ambitious dreams, who fled dictatorship and poverty and landed in Naples, only to discover a new kind of violence: a pernicious climate of racism and an unhelpful immigration system. Their only escape from the psychological torture of years spent waiting for documents in squalid camps is a small underground club in the heart of the city. The Teranga nightclub provides a rare safe space for migrants to meet young Italians.

programme.title: World Cup Slaves
programme.desc: Nepalese men employed in Qatar's construction industry tell Robert Booth how they work for little or no pay as they build the infrastructure ahead of the 2022 football World Cup. Appalling living conditions and unsafe employment are not the only difficulties they face: there is pressure and disbelief from families in Nepal when no money is sent back home

programme.title: 'Revenge pornography': Chrissy Chambers' search for justice
programme.desc: In April, it became a crime in England and Wales to post ‘revenge pornography'. Chrissy Chambers and her girlfriend Bria are YouTube's most popular lesbian content creators. The two channels they run have almost half a million subscribers. But before Chrissy came out, she had a boyfriend. He also has videos of her. And she says he's using them to destroy her

programme.title: The Native American kids who get $200k for graduating
programme.desc: The Ho-Chunk Nation are a Native American tribe that owns a string of casinos across Wisconsin. Ho Chunk children get a share of casino profits once they've graduated and turned 18. It's called their 18 Money. When they finish high school, they get given $200,000. Journalist and film-maker Jenny Kleeman meets the Ho Chunk kids of Black River Falls high school and their families as they graduate, along with tribal representatives and residents of Black River Falls, Wisconsin.

programme.title: Dallas Detective agency | Why journalists carry guns in the Philippines
programme.desc: Dallas Detective agency | Why journalists carry guns in the Philippines

programme.title: I came out as HIV positive to break down stigma | Staged Sex: Role of the Intimacy Co-Ordinator
programme.desc: Labour MP Lloyd Russell-Moyle came out as HIV positive in a speech in the House of Commons. He tells the Guardian's Owen Jones his diagnosis initially left him feeling like his insides had been ripped out but those fears gradually washed away and he has been able to live his life. He says he hopes his announcement can help break the stigma around HIV and help other people. | The role of the intimacy coordinator has become more important in the wake of the Harvey Weinstein allegations and the broader #MeToo movement. Ita O'Brien works on the set of a short film, Keep Breathing, breaking down the choreography of a sex scene to ensure the wellbeing of the actors and create a clear language and process.

programme.title: Share
programme.desc: Tim Chau is an 18-year-old Asian-American with more than 4m followers on Instagram. He lives online, grabbing his phone first thing in the morning and even taking baths with it sometimes. Although Tim usually shares funny memes, he occasionally posts about mental health. In exploring his reasons for these posts, we discover he has created a different persona online than in real life.

programme.title: The County
programme.sub-title: what happens after police kill someone you love?
programme.desc: When someone dies after an encounter with law enforcement, he leaves behind parents and children, loss and confusion. What's to be done when those people sworn to protect you are the same people who pull the trigger?

programme.title: Finding Ashley | Murder, corruption and cattle barons in Kenya
programme.desc: Finding Ashley: a Native American family's desperate search for their missing relative | Murder, corruption and cattle barons in Kenya

programme.title: Schitt's Creek

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: The Bachelor Party - The Roses attend the Escape Room portion of David and Patrick's Bachelor Party, but their participation wanes the more their personal dilemmas come to a head.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: The Pitch - Johnny, Stevie and Roland head to New York for their pitch meeting, while the family anxiously awaits their return.

programme.title: Workin' Moms
programme.desc: As Kate is served with an ultimatum, Anne attempts to resolve a conflict with Brenna's parents. Jenny's gamble at work backfires, resulting in the personal and the professional mixing.

programme.title: Workin' Moms
programme.desc: Kate heads to New York for a client pitch. Meanwhile in Toronto, Alice makes a choice based on Anne's recent actions and Frankie finds herself in the middle of a family conflict.

programme.title: Workin' Moms
programme.desc: Kate finds herself at a fork in the road. Anne realizes the truth about Alice. Ian guides Jenny to the light, while Val quantum leaps into love.

programme.title: Blandings
programme.desc: Clarence has grown an appalling beard, to the dismay of Beach and Connie, but Freddie needs Clarence to convince Hollywood starlet Pauline Petite of his bona fides.

programme.title: Blandings
programme.desc: Connie is trying to impress Colonel Fanshawe, in the hope that Clarence might succeed Fanshawe as Lord Lieutenant of Shropshire. But Beach is behaving very oddly indeed...

programme.title: Blandings

programme.title: Ed Byrne: Spoiler Alert
programme.desc: Are we all just a bunch of whiny little brats? Ed Byrne takes this question, turns it upside down & shakes it until the funny falls out.

programme.title: Jann
programme.desc: After months without a manager, Jann realizes she needs to take control of both her life and career, and decides to hire a personal assistant she sits in on her sister's nanny interviews to poach the best assistant for herself.

programme.title: Jann
programme.desc: When Jann's record label refuses to help her make a new album, she vows to find another way.

programme.title: Workin' Moms
programme.desc: Kate is put to the ultimate working mom test. Jenny is forced to own up to what she really wants. Alice's school project unites Anne's family, and Frankie attempts to fix the unfixable.

programme.title: Workin' Moms
programme.desc: The year is 2005 and a young ambitious Kate attends her best friend Anne's wedding, but both encounter situations that could change the course of their lives forever.

programme.title: Children Ruin Everything

programme.title: Stuart Goldsmith: I Need You Alive
programme.desc: Stuart Goldsmith's open-hearted stand-up about the realization that if everything goes according to plan, he dies first... He reflects on mortality, ambition & the future, in a landscape of lurid toys, vanishing friends & explosive tantrums.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: Little Sister - Moira's estranged sister Deedee pays an unexpected visit, while David agrees to talk with one of Jocelyn's students about being 'different'.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: Surprise Party - Johnny tries to arrange a surprise birthday party for Moira. Things backfire when Moira unwittingly takes over the planning of her own party.

programme.title: Penn and Teller Fool Us
programme.desc: In this episode Penn & Teller are challenged with a gory card trick, a 14 year-old close up magician meanwhile a female magician gambles with Jonathan's money and a familiar face surprises the duo.

programme.title: Wives With Knives
programme.desc: After two failed relationships Michelle Covington is swept off her feet by a former high school classmate. But excessive drinking makes him abusive. The couple gets in a nasty fight with the boyfriend in danger of bleeding to death from a stab wound.

programme.title: Inside Lehman Brothers: The Story Goes On
programme.desc: The falling, in 2008, of Lehman Brothers, plunged the world into one of the biggest recessions of all times. In a captivating investigation, Jennifer Deschamps looks at what caused the loss of a bank above suspicion.

programme.title: Born To Kill?
programme.desc: A profile of Richard Trenton Chase, also known as 'The Vampire of Sacramento'.

programme.title: British Gangsters
programme.desc: With a history rich in criminal activity, England's campital gives Bernie the chance to meet numerous 'faces' that have shaped London's colorful past, as well as present day names.

programme.title: The Fall
programme.desc: THE FALL continues as Spector [Jamie Dornan] meets other in-mates in the secure psychiatric facility. As Dr Larson [Krister Henriksson] begins his assessment, Spector starts to open up about his past.

programme.title: Narcos
programme.desc: In the aftermath of a massive military effort to take Pablo into custody, the family reunites while enemies worry. Steve and Connie fight about safety.

programme.title: Inside the Mind
programme.desc: He studied serial killers of the past whilst at University. Why? So he could become a serial killer himself. Stephen Griffiths then gave himself a name so the world could remember him more easily.

programme.title: An En Vogue Christmas
programme.desc: When her late father and uncle Marty's club, The Opera House, is about to be foreclosed, Kendall must convince her old friends, Terry, Cindy and Rhona of the R&B powerhouse En Vogue, to put on a Christmas concert to keep the beloved club in business.

programme.title: Christmas Bunny

programme.title: Who Wants to Be a Millionaire?
programme.desc: Former `Top Gear' presenter and opinionated `The Sunday Times' and `The Sun' columnist Jeremy Clarkson presents the rebooted version of `Who Wants to Be a Millionaire?', the 12-question quiz with a £1,000,000 prize. Each contestant can use three traditional lifelines: 50-50 which removes half of the answers, Ask the Audience which polls the studio audience for their answer, and Phone a Friend, wherein the contestant can call a friend for 30 seconds to ask for their advice. However, there is now a fourth lifeline: Ask the Host, where the contestant can ask Clarkson if he knows the answer to the question, and there is also a new second `safety net', previously set at £32,000, which is now able to be set by the contestant themselves. Also, contestants must first win their chance to play the quiz by winning the Fastest Fingers First round, competing against other potential players to be the quickest to answer a question with sequenced answers.

programme.title: Am I Perfect?
programme.desc: We meet Maddy, your average 19-year old girl feeling the pressures placed upon women to look a certain way – so for Ten Weeks she is going to try everything the media and her favourite celebrities suggest. Hopefully at the end she will present herself to her friends, family and public as ‘Perfect'! But first Maddy meets with the dietician who voices her concerns with the extreme nature of the challenge. Meanwhile at a medical check-up Maddy discovers she falls into the ‘OBESE' category on the BMI. Motivated now more than before, Maddy kick-starts her journey with the Cabbage Soup Diet, daily Military Boot Camp classes and receives her very first spray tan.

programme.title: Am I Perfect?
programme.desc: Maddy's spirits are high as she journeys into Week 2, having already lost 5kg she is driven to keep losing more! She eats like a caveman on the Paleo Diet, tests her coordination in Home Exercise Videos and meets with a professional to learn the tricks of makeup. Week 3 is off to a rocky start with Maddy gagging on her first spoonful of the Baby Food Diet, she seeks advice from the Internet on what to do to quench hunger. Maddy visits the Dentist to get her teeth Hollywood whitened and tries Rock Climbing for the very first time – for the first time Maddy becomes overwhelmed and breaks down in tears. She is left contemplating whether or not she should continue.

programme.title: Sanford And Son S1E5
programme.sub-title: A Matter Of Life And Breath
programme.desc: Lamont and Fred, at Lamont's insistence, take advantage of the free tests offered by a Breathmobile. The results convince Fred that he has tuberculosis. The pair soon discover the results were put in the wrong envelope and it's Lamont who should be concerned about his health.

programme.title: Sanford And Son S1E6
programme.desc: Fred covers his clumsiness by proclaiming "we were robbed" and he turns into a boastful hero cited for bravery. But Lamont finds the shattered remains of his prized porcelain and glass collection and decides to teach his father a lesson by staging a "robbery" of his own.

programme.title: Sanford And Son S1E7
programme.desc: Angered by his father's constant interruption of his dates, Lamont moves out to pursue the life of a swinging bachelor. But much to Lamont's disappointment, it's the newly unchaperoned Fred who is besieged by the ladies.

programme.title: Sanford And Son S1E8
programme.desc: Fred's failure to pay any bills brings threats of turned off utilities and repossessed furniture. But when the collection agents come to take away the furniture, the quick thinking Fred turns a fall into a fast fortune.

programme.title: Sanford And Son S1E9
programme.desc: Lamont buys two coffins at an auction and is determined to sell them at a large profit. Very superstitious about having coffins in the house, Fred decides to sleep in the back of the truck until they are sold. But what Fred doesn't know is that he's soon to be sharing his sleeping quarters with some unexpected company.

programme.title: Sanford And Son S1E10
programme.desc: Lamont strongly objects to his father's proposal of marriage to the widow Donna Harris (Lynn Hamilton). Lamont's protestations that no one can take the place of his mother leads to a heated three?way argument and one fiery exit.

programme.title: Sanford And Son S2E19
programme.desc: Feeling jealous and neglected, Fred conjures up several ruses that will hopefully keep Lamont from spending so much time with Julio. Convinced his son doesn't want to be his pal anymore, he also sets out to make him feel guilty by meeting with an agent from a funeral home to discuss burial insurance.

programme.title: Sanford And Son S2E20
programme.desc: Lamont is upset when Fred announces that he plans to marry a young woman he has just met. When the young lady arrives at the house, Lamont is shocked to be face-to-face with one of his old girlfriends. Fred is crushed, offering to move out and let Lamont marry her. But Lamont has a better idea.

programme.title: Sanford And Son S2E21
programme.sub-title: Home Sweet Home For The Aged
programme.desc: Fred is caught up in a series of frustrating situations when he becomes a resident of a senior citizens' home. Fred is put in the home by Lamont, who plans to work his way around the world on a tramp steamer and doesn't want to leave his father alone. Life becomes unbearable in the home, so when his friend Bubba pays a visit, Fred gets an idea not only how to get back home, but how to torpedo Lamont's plans.

programme.title: Sanford And Son S2E22
programme.desc: Lamont outsmarts himself when he buys what he believes is a rare antique commode for only $20. Fred disapproves of the deal but Lamont insists that he can sell it for $400. Mr. Osborne (Herb Voland), husband of the woman who sold the item, offers to buy it back for $200. The Sanfords agree but regret it when an antique dealer, Emile Duval (Jonathan Harris), offers $900. Lamont then buys it back from Osborne for $300. The whole affair turns out to be a con game and Fred tries to salvage the deal in his own way.

programme.title: Sanford And Son S2E23
programme.desc: Nine-year-old Jason (Lincoln Kilpatrick Jr.) worms his way into the Sanford yard and eventually into Fred's heart. Touched by the runaway's loneliness, Fred gets an idea to help others like Jason -- but he's not prepared for the results.

programme.title: Sanford And Son S2E24
programme.desc: Fred, Lamont and Rollo almost become stars in an X-rated movie until they are faced with the "naked" truth and the wrath of Esther.

programme.title: Sanford And Son S1E1
programme.desc: Lamont discovers that the porcelain figure he has bought is worth a great deal of money and decides auctioning off the piece will bring the best price. Fred's actions as a shill backfire, shattering Lamont's chance for freedom...and the statue.

programme.title: Americanos

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Hawaii
programme.desc: Andrew heads to Hawaii, going beyond the typical tourist destinations to sample authentic Hawaiian cuisine, including poi, octopus, wild boar organs and even Spam.

programme.title: National Parks Adventure
programme.desc: A team of modern day explorers take an off-trail adventure through the national parks of the USA, showing the awe-inspiring beauty found within America's most legendary outdoor playgrounds.

programme.title: Washington D.C. to Columbus

programme.title: The Queen and Prince Philip
programme.desc: Celebrating the Golden Wedding Anniversary of the Queen and Prince Philip, this programme is a sympathetic look at not only their lives together, but also an insight into Britain and the changes it has gone through in 50 Glorious Years.

programme.title: Prince Harry
programme.desc: If the Palace thought that 2023 would be a quieter year after the drama and tragedy of 2022 then the release of Prince Harry's autobiography Spare has just about destroyed all hope.

programme.title: Cash Machine

programme.title: Green Bean
programme.desc: Mr. Bean's electricity is cut off so he decides to build a wind turbine.

programme.title: Rat Trap
programme.desc: Mr. Bean has to deal with an unwanted house guest but the stubborn rat refuses to leave.

programme.title: Caring Bean

programme.title: A Dog's Life
programme.desc: Mr Bean dog-sits for Irma and while in the park comes across a professional dog-walker.

programme.title: Bean Phone
programme.desc: Mr. Bean wants a smartphone but does not have enough money to buy one.

programme.title: Birthday Bother
programme.desc: It's Irma's birthday. Bean buys a bargain-bin load of cards, and writes out two –one nice, one silly.

programme.title: Big TV

programme.title: A Ray of Sunshine

programme.title: Rare Bird

programme.title: A Royal Makeover

programme.title: What A Load Of Rubbish

programme.title: Birthday Bear

programme.title: Bean in Love

programme.title: Coconut Shy

programme.title: Toothache

programme.title: Keyboard Capers
programme.desc: Determined to play the piano, Mr Bean finds a tune in his heart and sausages for fingers.

programme.title: Greed Is Good?
programme.desc: When Jestro uses the Book of Greed to rob Auremville of its riches, he also gets Lance's parents as prisoners and these demanding rich folks are too much for even monsters to handle. Jestro's not sure what to do with his new castle in the Lava Lands. “Every castle needs a big chamber filled with treasure” says the Book of Monsters so they've got to go out looting! The BOM convinces Jestro to call forth GENERAL MAGMAR, and Jestro appoints him as “general manager” of “castle operations,” much to Magmar's dismay. Meanwhile, Jestro and the BOM find the BOOK OF GREED. This will allow them to make greedy, rapacious monsters that will bring them all the treasure they want to fill their castle! They'll head to the richest town in the realm – AUREMVILLE! Meanwhile, in Auremville, the NEXO-Knights arrive for a huge “Gold is Good” ball at Lance's house. When the Monsters finally arrive in Auremville, a battle breaks out and the greedy monsters make off with everything…including Lance's parents, Goldie and Cuthbert Richmond who are clad in the finest golden garments and so look valuable! Lance will now be forced to live…poor. The Knights have to get his parents back. Meanwhile, his parents – Cuthbert and Goldie Richmond –think their imprisonment in Jestro's gold-filled castle is a “spa holiday” with the worst service. They order Magmar and the monsters around like servants and drive them all crazy. The Knights pile into the Fortrex and head for the Lava Lands, formulating a plan along the way to free Lance's parents. In a village half-way to Jestro's Castle, the Knights run into…Jestro and his monsters headed the other way with Lance's parents and all the gold they've stolen. There's a big fight, until they realize they might have the same goal and decide to deal. The BOM wants to give them back all the gold and Lance's parents. Lance says “No deal.” “We'll take the gold, you can keep my parents.” It's a weird and comical stand-off. Finally, Clay convinces Lance he has to take his parents back even if they don't always get along (and, it's the only way to get the gold back.)

programme.title: Peak Performance
programme.desc: The search for the Sandman leads Mateo and the others to the tallest mountain in the Dream World, but Lunia's hourglass puts a target on their backs.

programme.title: The Anomaly
programme.desc: A surprise visit from the Chief Inspector of the Night Bureau forces Mateo to hide Z-Blob, who goes on an adventure in the heart of Brooklyn.

programme.title: The Digiverse And Beyond, The Elemental Masters
programme.desc: Tackling a puzzle about technology in Ninjago. A riddle requires the Ninja to consider the powers and history of the Elemental Masters.

programme.title: The Jade Princess
programme.desc: In the wake of an assassination attempt targeting the royal family, the ninja invite the royal princess, HARUMI, into their makeshift family. Lloyd glimpses someone escaping over the rooftops with a sack on their back. Fearing it is the kidnapped princess, Lloyd takes up the chase! He discovers to his surprise, however, that the masked intruder is none other than the princess herself, who is not quite as docile or meek as she pretends. She has a habit of sneaking out of her chambers at night to feed the homeless who surround the Imperial Palace. This revelation only endears her to Lloyd more and Harumi and Lloyd quickly strike up a friendship. Unfortunately, trouble catches up to the ninja when the Sons Of Garmadon target the second Oni mask and attack the palace. The scope of the attack proves more than the Ninja were prepared for as the Sons of Garmadon detonate a series of subterranean bombs, bringing down part of the palace. Lloyd and Harumi escape onto the flying ship, DESTINY'S BOUNTY. But the victory is a pyrrhic one. The second Oni Mask has been stolen and Harumi's parents and Master Hutchins are feared lost.

programme.title: The Pranks
programme.desc: The friends are using their talents to pull a prank on Olivia. But who gets the last laugh?Stephanie finds the perfect front page story for the school paper! It's almost too good to be true. Emma and Andrea go undercover to solve the mystery of the two Jacobs.

programme.title: Andrea's Big Moment
programme.desc: When famous pop star Livi comes to Heartlake City to judge a talent show, our five friends Olivia, Mia, Andrea, Emma and Stephanie all decide to enter – and one of them, in particular, really wants to win but faces some serious challenge from an old rival. A talent show has come to Heartlake City and all the girls enter the talent competition hoping to impress the judges, especially their idol, pop star Chloe. No one wants a shot at stardom more than Andrea, which is why the other girls are surprised when she doesn't show up to practice before the first round of the competition. Very nearly eliminated prior to the big show, Andrea panics and throws herself into an intense practice-training mode, even shutting her friends out when they're trying to help her with her performance. Just moments before her live TV debut, Andrea realizes she's missing a key element to her act. Can she pull it off without her friends? And are the other girls willing to help after being pushed away?

programme.title: Kate's Island
programme.desc: The five friends leave for science camp that takes place on an island and during the trip, they meet the stand-offish Kate – but they soon realize that there's more to her than meets the eyes and that you shouldn't judge the book by its cover. No one is more excited than Olivia about science camp at a beautiful rocky offshore island with a lighthouse. But Olivia quickly gets off on the wrong foot with a mysterious girl named Kate who seems obsessed with a medallion necklace and the island's rumored history of pirates and treasure. Even worse for Olivia, Kate seems to be growing extra chummy with Mia, even sneaking around the island with her late at night. With the help of Stephanie, Emma and Andrea, Olivia is determined to get to the bottom of the girls' secret friendship and find out once and for all what they're searching for on the island, but they better not let Mrs. Stevens catch them out of their cabin past curfew.

programme.title: The Grand Hotel
programme.desc: The five friends help out at The Grand Hotel that Andrea's family just bought during what was supposed to be a quiet weekend until a hotel critic arrives unexpectedly. The girls are ready to do everything to make a great impression – but things don't quite go according to plan. Andrea, Stephanie, Olivia, Emma and Mia have come for breakfast at the fanciest hotel in town, now owned by Andrea's family. When Andrea's aunt has to leave town, the girls volunteer to run the hotel for the weekend with the help of quirky Grandma Jean. This is the perfect job for Stephanie's expert managerial skills but then the hotel suddenly fills to capacity with guests, including a hotel critic that can make or break the hotel's reputation! Now the girls find themselves in over their heads juggling reception, childcare, food prep and waitressing, a dog-walking service and a testy chef who quits on them in the middle of dinner. Unfortunately, much of this is their own fault. Can the girls save the Grand Hotel from themselves?

programme.title: Ninjaball Run
programme.desc: When the ninja learn that Darreth's Mojo Dojo is to be destroyed and Darreth doesn't have the money to save it, our heroes enter the annual NinjaBall Run to win its cash prize in order to save the dojo. As Lloyd continues to train and unlock his hidden powers, the Ninja learn land developers are going to destroy Darreth's Mojo Dojo unless Darreth can find the money to save it. The Ninja decide to enter their Ninja Tank into the annual NinjaBall Run cross-country rally to try to win its cash prize. Revisiting past characters who also enter the race, the high-speed derby will only grow more dangerous as Garmadon enters his Black Bounty, realizing this is the perfect chance to use his Mega-Weapon and rid the ninja. In the end, the Ninja will discover a few secrets within their Ninja Tank, allowing them to beat Garmadon's Bounty by a millisecond and saving Darreth's Dojo with their well-deserved cash prize. And as a final surprise, the Ninja steal back the Destiny's Bounty and make it their own once again.

programme.title: Child's Play
programme.desc: When the Ninja interrupt Lord Garmadon from using his Mega-Weapon to ‘turn back the clock' and bring to life the fossils of a monster, the Ninja are accidentally hit and turned into kids and are now forced to enlist Lloyd's help to battle the awakened monster. Tired of intense training, Lloyd yearns to play and enjoy his youth. The Ninja remind Lloyd that along with great power, comes great responsibility. When the Ninja interrupt Lord Garmadon from using his Mega-Weapon to ‘turn back the clock' and bring to life the fossils of a monster, the Ninja are accidentally hit and soon discover they've been turned into kids! Seeking Lloyd's help and relying on childhood antics, the five ninja kids must destroy the reawakened monster that's hunting them in the city. In the end, Lloyd makes the difficult decision and sacrifices his youth in order to save them from the beast, turning forward the clock and turning Lloyd into a young man. Sensei Wu fears now that since Lloyd is young man, the final battle of good versus evil approaches sooner than he had ever expected.

programme.title: The Surge
programme.desc: After a time of peace, the Ninja are called back into action. The spirit of the defeated Overlord has infected the electric grid of Ninjago and is using all available technology to exact his revenge on Lloyd. Nowhere is safe but fortunately, the Ninja have been given the powerful Techno Blades. But the only problem is that they have no idea how to use them. Time has passed since the Ultimate Battle, and while the Golden Ninja continues to watch over Ninjago, the other Ninja have become complacent as schoolteachers. When a mysterious invitation from genius Cyrus Borg brings them to the futuristic New Ninjago City, trouble surges when a digital virus of the Overlord takes over technology. The Golden Ninja makes a heroic entrance, only to find out his Golden Power supercharges the enemy. Sensei Wu stays behind so that the Ninja can escape with the only thing that can save Ninjago's future – Borg's Techno Weapons.

programme.title: The Art Of The Silent Fist
programme.desc: The Ninja go into hiding but an army of the Digtial Overlord's evil robotic Nindroids are hunting them wherever they go. Their only chance is to learn the secrets of the Techno blades and use them to cut all power to save Ninjao from this technological menace. The Ninja hide out at a safe place void of technology – Sensei Garmadon's Sanctuary. That night, Zane is visited by Borg's female robo-assistant, Pixal. She warns them that the Digital Overlord is after Lloyd's Golden Power in order to become flesh, but the Techno Blades can reboot the system and erase him for good. After a highly advanced army of Nindroids attacks the Sanctuary, Lloyd flees with his father into the wilderness of Ninjago, while the rest set off on a quest to turn off all power in Ninjago, so that they can erase the Digital Overlord once and for all.

programme.title: The Book Of Total Badness
programme.desc: The NEXO-Knights must fight Jestro's Monsters of Destruction which are attacking all over the Kingdom. But Merlok smells a trap…is he right? In a dark, destroyed part of the kingdom, Jestro arrives at the ruins of a HUGE castle. The Book of Monsters knows this place: the great evil wizard Monstrux lived here. The Book sniffs out some powerful magic in the ruins: “The Book of Destruction.” With this, The Book tells Jestro they can destroy the NEXO-Knights and then attack the King's Castle and cause massive destruction. Jestro creates destructive monsters and sends them all over the realm, so the Knights must separate and fight single combats all over the place. The Knights lose these battles (lesson: they have to work as a team!) And, just when the Knights are scattered across the Kingdom, Jestro attacks the King's Castle! It looks like all is lost. When Aaron, who has escaped, returns to see Jestro's attack, he realizes he must gather his fellow Knights. Merlok says it's very dangerous, but Aaron says he must take the risk to gather the Knights and save Knighton.

programme.title: The Might And The Magic
programme.desc: Aaron races across the kingdom to gather the NEXO-Knights as Jestro and his Destructive Monsters attack the King's Castle. The Knights must get back to the capitol in time, or Jestro will rule the kingdom! Jestro, while still attacking the King's Castle, has second thoughts until the Book of Monsters orders the mad jester to feed him another magic book he's found (and has been saving.) It's the powerful “Book of Revenge!” Now, combining the powers of Revenge and Destruction, Jestro and his monsters will get their vengeance on King Halbert and the Kingdom of Knighton. Jestro and his monsters lay siege…will they destroy the castle?! Meanwhile, Aaron races across the Kingdom gathering the NEXO-Knights one at a time. As each Knight rejoins the group, they become a more and more powerful team. They even get Robin to join them as the Black Knight in his repaired power suit. Our Knights arrive, finally regrouped, fight off Jestro, save the castle and the King. It's a glorious victory! The King is so pleased after seeing how the brave NEXO-Knights saved his kingdom, he allows Macy to join them as an official NEXO-Knight.

programme.title: Back To School
programme.desc: When the NEXO-Knights are sloppy in a fight with Jestro, Merlok 2.0 sends them back to the Knights' Academy. Not only for a brush-up but to find out what Jestro is after in its hallowed halls. As they Knights battle Jestro – in a somewhat haphazard and lazy way – they discuss the fact that Jestro never wins and that they're always getting over on him. Despite defeating the jerky Jester and his evil Book, Merlok 2.0 discovers that something about the attack on the village is tied to the Knights' Academy. It looks like that's where they'll strike next. It wouldn't hurt for the Knights to go “back to school” to watch for Jestro and for some refresher training. Merlok is sure Jestro wants something at the Academy, but he doesn't know what it is. The Knights are very much “fish out of water” at the academy, even with the “cool kids” – Robin and Ava – showing them around. The next generation of Knights is being taught to integrate the NEXO-Magic of Merlok into their fighting techniques and these kids are good (so good, they initially kick the lazy, know-it-all Knight's butts!) Their old principal, the ever-ornery Headmaster Brickland, sets them straight: they're all still slackers, and they better get their acts together (especially Lance!) The Knights take shifts as “library helpers” much to the delight of the old squirebot librarian, MARGE. They're convinced Jestro is after a book…isn't he always after a book? When Jestro attacks, the Knights help organize the students and there's a big fight in the Academy Library versus Jestro and his Monsters. They drive Jestro off without letting him steal any books! Victory! But as Jestro leaves, we see him holding what the Book of Monsters really wanted: a snow globe with a castle in it that was sitting on the librarian's desk. In the Lava Lands, Jestro throws the snow globe into a volcano and it frees the massive Castle of Monstrux from its snowy magic prison

programme.title: Greed Is Good?

The BOM convinces Jestro to call forth GENERAL MAGMAR, and Jestro appoints him as “general manager” of “castle operations,” much to Magmar's dismay. Meanwhile, Jestro and the BOM find the BOOK OF GREED. This will allow them to make greedy, rapacious monsters that will bring them all the treasure they want to fill their castle! They'll head to the richest town in the realm – AUREMVILLE! Meanwhile, in Auremville, the NEXO-Knights arrive for a huge “Gold is Good” ball at Lance's house. When the Monsters finally arrive in Auremville, a battle breaks out and the greedy monsters make off with everything…including Lance's parents, Goldie and Cuthbert Richmond who are clad in the finest golden garments and so look valuable! Lance will now be forced to live…poor. The Knights have to get his parents back. Meanwhile, his parents – Cuthbert and Goldie Richmond –think their imprisonment in Jestro's gold-filled castle is a “spa holiday” with the worst service. They order Magmar and the monsters around like servants and drive them all crazy. The Knights pile into the Fortrex and head for the Lava Lands, formulating a plan along the way to free Lance's parents. In a village half-way to Jestro's Castle, the Knights run into…Jestro and his monsters headed the other way with Lance's parents and all the gold they've stolen. There's a big fight, until they realize they might have the same goal and decide to deal. The BOM wants to give them back all the gold and Lance's parents. Lance says “No deal.” “We'll take the gold, you can keep my parents.” It's a weird and comical stand-off. Finally, Clay convinces Lance he has to take his parents back even if they don't always get along (and, it's the only way to get the gold back.)

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: The quest for the Omega Lock takes the Autobots and the Decepticons to Cyberton for an epic battle.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: The Autobots question Optimus' leadership abilities.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: While Optimus struggles to survive after Megatron's destruction of the Autobot base.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: The second-rate villains of Detroit team up to beat the Autobots.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Bumblebee thinks back on the time he spent with Bulkhead in the Autobot Boot Camp.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Unlikely matchups! It's Optimus Prime and Dinobot Grimlock vs. Blackarachnia and Meltdown.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.sub-title: More Than Meets the Eye, Part 1
programme.desc: The heroic Autobots and the evil Decepticons are marooned and deactivated on planet Earth for 4 million years!

programme.title: Transformers
programme.sub-title: More Than Meets the Eye, Part 2
programme.desc: Using their robotic powers to hide in plain sight, the Autobots and Decepticons disguise themselves.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.sub-title: More Than Meets the Eye, Part 3
programme.desc: The Decepticons' ship to planet Cybertron is complete, and the odds are stacked against Optimus Prime.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Presumed to be defeated, the Decepticons have returned!

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: The Autobots search for signs of each other, but start to lose hope.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: The Ultimate Autobot Hunter is unleashed on our heroes.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Led by a new member, Team Prime launches a desperate assault on the Decepticon citadel.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Optimus Prime and the other Autobots try to breakthrough the energon grid.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: The Autobots battle, but this time in cyberspace, a virtual training program.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - The Sand Witch: A swamp monster kidnaps Baby as a gift for a witch. The witch, who thinks no one loves her, is amazed when Baby shows affection. When Papa comes to rescue Baby, he makes the witch understand that the loyal swamp monster has always loved her.

programme.title: The Magic Earrings
programme.desc: Hogatha manages to obtain the magic golden earrings of Sonoria that will enable her to hear Smurfy voices from afar. Following Lazy's snores, she almost reaches the Smurf Village until Harmony's horn-blasts blow in her earrings and she flies home in a rage.

programme.title: The Smurfs And The Money Tree
programme.desc: The wicked wizard Gargamel has come up with yet another diabolical plan with the help of his mother, who isn't much nicer than him. He wants to tempt the Smurfs with money of which they have no notion. Will Greedy take the bait?

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Smurfs At Sea: Papa Smurf recalls Dreamy's exciting voyage on the high seas and his gripping adventures with sea turtles, whales, desert islands... and pirates!

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - The Miracle Smurfer: The Smurfs learn that the mind is more powerful than matter when they are fooled by a quack's outrageously expensive miracle tonic. But Papa Smurf cures the Smurfs of their temporary naiveté and the charlatan of his villainy.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - The Three Smurfketeers: In another Smurf theatrical super-production based – very loosely – on Alexandre Dumas' characters, a masterpiece of the stage is created, with a few lines from Romeo and Juliet thrown in.

programme.title: Monster Smurfs
programme.desc: This is spook-a-Smurf eve, and all the Smurfs get ready for the fancy dress party… But Brainy Smurf gets hold of Papa Smurf's Book of Magic, and all the Smurfs are changed into hideous but funny creatures. Yet danger lurks...

programme.title: Revenge Of The Smurfs
programme.desc: A war is raging in the Middle Ages. Knights in armor in hot pursuit inadvertently destroy the Smurfs Village so a small band of Smurfs decide to avenge this wrongdoing. Won't Papa Smurf think this is too human-like a reaction?

programme.title: Beauty Is Only Smurf Deep
programme.desc: Periwinkle, a vain Pixie, is upset when her magic mirror tells her that Vanity is the fairest, not she. Periwinkle kidnaps Vanity, but the rest of the Smurfs come to Vanity's rescue. Periwinkle sees the error of her ways and they become friends.

programme.title: Wedding Bells For Gargamel
programme.desc: The Smurfs befriend a maiden in distress who is betrothed to Gargamel by convincing her father that the foolish wizard is insane.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - For The Love Of Gargamel: Trying a new spell on the Smurfs backfires when Gargamel turns himself into stone. The Smurfs are delirious with joy. Their archenemy will make them suffer no more!

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Greedy Goes On Strike: Get up early in the morning, before any other Smurf is out of bed, to prepare a scrumptious Smurfberry muffin. Spend all morning on preparing Smurf delicacies for lunch. Than all afternoon to have dinner ready – and delicious – on time. And do you get so much as a thank you form the Smurfs? So Greedy Smurf quits. The Village is in trouble... And soon, so is Greedy.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - The Golden Smurf Award: Hogatha disguises herself as the Golden Smurf Award to catch the Smurfs in order to use them as the main ingredient in her beauty cream. Vanity convinces her to try his recipe and before long, the wicked sorceress is covered with mud and sent careening over the hills into Gargamel's house.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - The Blue Plague: Brainy Smurf has decided to dedicate himself to the wellbeing of his fellow Smurfs. He is going to cure them of all ills… With a little help from the evil Gargamel!

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - The Secret Of Shadow Swamp: Grouchy, the Smurf who hates everything, doubly hates his own birthday party and goes to hide in Shadow Swamp... He is going to meet strange beings and stranger adventures while the other Smurfs search for him...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Flighty's Plight: Flighty Smurf, as his name implies, can't make his own mind up about anything. The other Smurfs take him to the forest for a survival test in which he can find his way home only by making decisions. He ends up in Balthazar's castle.

programme.title: Beauty Is Only Smurf Deep
programme.desc: Periwinkle, a vain Pixie, is upset when her magic mirror tells her that Vanity is the fairest, not she. Periwinkle kidnaps Vanity, but the rest of the Smurfs come to Vanity's rescue. Periwinkle sees the error of her ways and they become friends.

programme.title: Harmony Steals The Show
programme.desc: Harmony unwittingly signs a contract with Ghost Writer for a symphony that imprisons him in a ghostly nightclub for life! Papa Smurf demands a jury trial with ghostly jurors and a judge that finds Harmony innocent and Ghost Writer guilty of plagiarism.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Papa Smurf, Papa Smurf: Yes, there can be too much of a good thing. When an accident happens to Papa Smurf's magic formula and he ends up multiplied by two, the Smurfs are elated: two Papa Smurfs can give twice the good counsel and twice the loving that one can. But after a while, things get too complex in the Village. Especially when another accident doubles the number of Gargamels!

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Tubbies watch a little boy peel and mash some eggs for an egg mayonnaise sandwich. The Teletubbies laugh when they make a tune whilst eating their Tubby Custard.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies dance around the trees and watch some children drum with their friend Norris. Tinky Winky dance on the roof of Home Hill and wakes up the other Tubbies.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies are asleep, but Noo-Noo tidies up their blankets. They stop chasing him to watch some children learn about the number five. A flashing light appears in Teletubbyland.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Laa-Laa dances with her ball. A little boy tells us why he likes to live in his block of flats. A balloon appears in Teletubbyland. The Teletubbies follow a balloon.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: A voice trumpet appears and the Teletubbies dance, before watching two girls do some Flamenco dancing with their teacher. It's time for the Teletubbies to wash their feet. They love using their Tubby Sponges.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Noo-Noo tidies up Home hill before the Teletubbies slide up the slide to watch Natalie tell us about her brother's christening.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Tubbies watch some children are playing football in the park. Laa-Laa and Po love playing with the ball. While they play they sing a song about the ball.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies watch some children looking at penguins waddling and swimming. In Teletubbyland, the Tubbies play walk fast and slow, far and near and other different ways.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Tinky Winky says "Eh-oh". The Teletubbies and some children watch Tamzin Griffin pretend to be the Funny Lady and tell the story of the naughty hat. The Teletubbies are very happy when they find their favourite things to play with.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies leave their favourite things to watch some boys spinning some spinning tops to celebrate the Hanukah festival. Tinky Winky wears the skirt on his head to do a very special round and round dance.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Samira and her friends show the Teletubbies their gymnastic routines. The Teletubbies do their own gymnastics.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: In Teletubbyland, the Tubbies are trying to be quiet. They watch Oscar read the story of the Gingerbread Boy to his brother Felix. A voice trumpet appears and sings the nursery rhyme.

programme.title: The Snow Queen
programme.desc: In this magical fairy-tale, little orphan girl Gerda, must defeat the evil Snow Queen who has taken over the kingdom and kidnapped Gerda's brother, Kai. Gerda must embark on a perilous journey across the icy wonderland, facing swashbuckling pirates and treacherous trolls to defeat the Snow Queen and bring warmth back to the hearts of people everywhere. Based on the enduring fairy-tale by Hans Christian Anderson, The Snow Queen a fun-filled, frosty adventure for all the family!

programme.title: Miss Me This Christmas
programme.desc: Regina moves into her friend's suite at The Chesterton Hotel as she waits for her divorce settlement to come through on Christmas Day. While there, she starts a whirlwind romance with a billionaire, who proposes to her. But her soon-to-be ex-husband is not ready to give up on their marriage, leaving Regina to make the toughest decision of her life.

programme.title: 12 wishes for Christmas
programme.desc: Laura's new life coach has special powers and grants her 12 Christmas wishes. But before long, Laura realizes that her wishes are sparking unforeseen circumstances, and she must act quickly to get her life—and her dog—back before Christmas.

programme.title: Rosemont
programme.desc: Caught in a blizzard five days before Christmas, pregnant 23-year-old Lisa, and her new friend Brad, a professional snowboarder, take shelter at The Rosemont. After losing her daughter and granddaughter, the cantankerous owner Josephine has let it fall into disrepair. But now, stranded by the blizzard, with Lisa giving birth, everyone comes together to provide what they all need most - a family.

programme.title: A Perfect Christmas List
programme.desc: As a last wish, a recently hospitalized grandmother tasks her daughter Michelle and granddaughter Sara with a list of festive accomplishments to do together before Christmas, hoping that the adventure of the experience will repair their relationship.

programme.title: Booba Wheel Of Forune
programme.desc: A family show following the adventures of a joyful, funny and curious little creature called Booba.

programme.title: Dr Mad Rabbid is out of control!
programme.desc: Mad Rabbid has found a great way to become invisible, now he just needs a guinea pig to test it.

programme.title: Rabbid Obsession.
programme.desc: The rabbids have decided to reach the moon... thanks to a big ladder.

programme.title: Shaun the Sheep
programme.desc: It's countryside chaos as Shaun The Sheep returns to the small screen with his very own series. Peace in the valley turns to mayhem in the meadow as Shaun leads his flock into all sorts of scrapes and scraps, running rings around sheepdog Bitzer when the Farmer's back is turned.

programme.title: The Adventures of Peter and Wolf
programme.desc: A sitcom about the adventures of ordinary schoolboy Peter and talking Wolf connecting the world of people to parallel universes, where there live robots and vampires, werewolves and zombies, giants and aliens, fairies and centaurs, clones and invisible men! The characters will have to solve locals' problems and regularly save the world.

programme.title: I'll Get You! Holiday
programme.desc: The action takes place in all year round resort, where Wolf doesn't chase Hare to eat him anymore: now it's all about sports and competition. However, in his crazy chase after recognition and victories the grey hooligan often uses methods that aren't really fair, which provokes awkward and funny situations.

programme.title: Bat Pat
programme.desc: The series follows the comedy adventures of Bat Pat and the Silver brothers Martin, Leo and Rebecca as they unravel mysteries and cross paths with supernatural creatures of the night that lurk, haunt, shriek and dig themselves up in every dark corner of their home in Fogville, a small town that seems to be the center of all things weird in the world, a veritable magnet to ghosts, mummies, witches, creatures, werewolves and things that go bump in the night. Bat Pat will prove that the supernatural isn't always evil but just misunderstood. Our heroes will come to understand something important: the supernatural “bad guys” are not really bad, but normal people whose actions are misunderstood by the more inhabitants of Fogville and what they really want is... just help!

programme.title: Monsuno
programme.desc: The series revolves around re-awakened Monster DNA, called Monsuno, that finds its way into the unsuspecting hands of adventure-seeking teenagers Chase, Jinja, and Bren. Accompanied by their Monsuno, Lock, Charger, and Quickforce, they are searching for Chase's father Jeredy Suno, the creator of the Monsuno

programme.title: Pincode
programme.desc: Grown up Kikoriki characters rock the world with their scientific superpowers and tell the kids scientific facts in a most entertaining way. The crew follows Captain Pin as they learn about the world we live in and share this knowledge with us.

programme.title: Talking Tom and Friends
programme.desc: Things get even more epic in Season 3 as Talking Tom and Friends try new ways to make their dreams come true, making more friends (and enemies) along the way!

programme.title: Ollie! The Boy Who Became What He Ate
programme.desc: Ollie is a 6-year-old with a massive imagination, often lost in his own world - flipping, sliding, climbing and rocket-blasting through the house, practicing at being the master of all things. But even masters need to stop and refuel. When meals or snack time interrupt Ollie's play, he finds himself confronted with the real challenge of childhood trying new food. To escape his predicament, Ollie uses his magic spoon to transport himself, along with his sister Poppy, and her stuffy Nummy, to a food planet filled with adventure and the very food Ollie stuck his spoon into.

programme.title: Pirate school
programme.desc: On a small remote island surrounded by endless seas, a special Pirate School was opened, where children from pirate families study. Among them are Keel, Fuse and Bobo. The pirate origin does not relieve them from study and normal school duties.

programme.title: Action Dad

Determined to return to the lap of luxury, Maximo uses Hugo to meet a rich widow—and learns that love and trust must be earned in this hilarious film featuring Rob Lowe, Kristen Bell, and Raquel Welch.

Flashbacks reveal teenage Derek and Dave as a couple of cockney chancers out to pull as many girls as they can, and Dinah and Doreen down from London and enjoying independence for the very first time in their lives. A chance meeting on their return to the seaside will bring up old rivalries and tensions and lead to a hilarious clash between the old world and the new.

As Sam's plans begin to unravel, the young men quickly realize how complicated love and friendship can be.

But when Liz brings home a new boyfriend from college -- Ned finds that his comfortable world is turned upside down as Liz tries to divert his attention to Carol, an attractive single woman who lives in Ned's neighborhood.
